title: Adding Guardrails with LangChain
tagline: Stop unsafe or malformed agent behavior with LangChain guardrail middleware.

story.problem: A capable, observable agent is still a liability if it accepts injected input, leaks PII, drifts off-topic, or emits unsafe output.
story.solution: Use LangChain guardrail middleware for input checks, output validation, PII handling, and approval-sensitive operations with fail-closed behavior.
story.outcome: An agent that rejects or repairs unsafe interactions before they reach users or downstream systems.

quickstart.run: createdb nebius_cookbook && uv sync && make dev

endpoints.description: Run the guarded agent with validated input and output.
Attach user feedback to a LangSmith run inherited from Cookbook #7.
List the inherited long-term memories stored for a user.
Summarize what the agent knows about a user.
Delete the inherited long-term memories stored for a user.
Prometheus metrics scrape endpoint, including guardrail pass/fail counters.
